channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Zayn Kicks Back With ‘Konnakol’: Stream It Now
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Welcome to the latest music update. Today, we're talking about Zayn Malik, the British pop sensation who's back with his fifth studio album, Konnakol.
[Soft music transitions in the background]
Host: This new collection features previously-released tracks like "Sideways" and lead single "Die For Me". Konnakol is Zayn's first album since 2024's Room Under the Stairs, which peaked at No. 15 on the Billboard 200 and No. 3 on the U.K.'s Official Albums Chart.
[Music transitions to a slightly upbeat tone]
Host: Zayn co-produced the new LP with Malay, a collaboration that dates back to his debut solo album Mind of Mine in 2016. To promote the new record, Zayn will make his first late-night TV interview and performance on The Tonight Show with Jimmy Fallon on April 21, followed by an appearance on The Drew Barrymore Show on April 23.
[Music builds up to a more energetic tone]
Host: But that's not all - Zayn is also kicking off his largest solo tour to date on May 12 at the AO Arena in Manchester, England. The KONNAKOL Tour will visit major cities across the world, including London, Los Angeles, and Miami, and is scheduled to close on November 20.
[Music transitions back to a softer tone]
Host: The album's name, Konnakol, refers to the art of performing percussion syllables vocally, a style found in South Indian Carnatic music. Zayn says it's a sound that holds the reverberation of a time before words existed and is a reflection of his heritage and inspiration.
[Outro music plays]
Host: That's the latest on Zayn Malik's new album, Konnakol. Stream it now and get ready for his upcoming tour. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll catch you in the next update.
